_comment: Opalyx (OPX) coin definition for Miningcore. Place the contents of the 'opalyx' object into Miningcore's coins.json (the top-level object keyed by coin symbol). KawPow uses the ProgPoW/KawPow family; Miningcore talks to opalyxd over RPC and to miners over Stratum. See MINING.md and miningcore/opalyx-pool-template.json.

opalyx.name: Opalyx
opalyx._blockHasher_comment: Opalyx inherits Ravencoin's KawPow block-id scheme. If your fork keeps Ravencoin's GetX16RHash for the on-disk block hash, use the same blockHasher value Miningcore ships for Ravencoin (ravencoin). Confirm against your daemon's getblock output before going live.
opalyx._minConfirmations_comment: 120 blocks = coinbase maturity (60) plus headroom. Exchanges should use far more (120-360) before crediting deposits; pools only need maturity before paying out mined coinbases.
